scripts.build: npm run build -w @ai-chat/contracts && npm run build -w @ai-chat/api && npm run build -w @ai-chat/demo-ui
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @ai-chat/api && npm run lint -w @ai-chat/demo-ui
scripts.lint:ci: npm run lint:ci -w @ai-chat/api && npm run lint:ci -w @ai-chat/demo-ui
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @ai-chat/contracts && npm run typecheck -w @ai-chat/api && npm run typecheck -w @ai-chat/demo-ui && npm run typecheck -w @ai-chat/contracts
scripts.test: npm run contracts && npm run test -w @ai-chat/api
scripts.ci: npm run lint:ci && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
